metadata.title: When I Survey the Wondrous Cross
metadata.subtitle: Isaac Watts (1707) — Passion meditation
metadata.composer: Anonymous, tune "Rockingham" by Edward Miller (1731–1807) or "Hamburg" by Lowell Mason (1824)
metadata.x_pd_basis: Watts died 1748; Miller (d. 1807) and Mason (d. 1872) all > 150 years post-mortem
